contract.name: v2/awards/count/subaward/award_id.md
contract.description: Returns the number of subawards linked to a specific generated_unique_award_id; observed responses include zero and non-zero counts as integers.

award_id.description: Generated unique award identifier used by USAspending (e.g., CONT_AWD_7200AA23F50027_7200_7200AA22A00006_7200).
award_id.constraints: Required path segment; must exactly match the casing of an existing generated_unique_award_id. Unknown values respond with JSON 404 detail.

subawards.description: Non-negative count of subawards associated with the prime award.

quirks: award_id must be provided as the generated_unique_award_id; other identifier formats return JSON 404 detail.
Path matching is case-sensitive; casing mismatches return HTML 404 payloads instead of JSON.
A trailing slash is required to avoid a 301 redirect with text/html content.
OPTIONS requests expose metadata about accepted parsers and renders.
risks: Callers must handle non-JSON responses (HTML 404 or 301 redirect) when the URL casing or trailing slash is incorrect.
Integrations must resolve the exact generated_unique_award_id up front; nearby permutations return 404 without recovery hints.
gaps: Assistance-type generated_unique_award_ids have not been validated with successful responses.

probes.notes: pass: confirmed non-zero subaward count for a contract award.
pass: verifies zero-count response keeps subawards field present.
fail: documented sample award_id not found.

response.bodyExcerpt:
Not Found

The requested resource was not found on this server.

probes.notes: fail: casing mismatch falls through to HTML 404.
fail: missing trailing slash triggers redirect to slash-terminated URL.

mismatches: Documentation sample award_id 'ASST_NON_NNX17AJ96A_8000' is documented as valid but returns JSON 404 detail in production.
gaps: Assistance-type generated_unique_award_ids have not been validated with successful responses.
risks: Non-JSON error payloads (HTML 404, redirect) can break strict JSON clients if trailing slash or casing deviates.
Integrations must pre-resolve generated_unique_award_ids; unresolved identifiers yield hard 404 errors.
